CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_POWER_AURORA_CHAIN_POWE: Each stack increases damage dealt by Sword Grave cards.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_POWER_MARK_POWER.title: Mark
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_POWER_MARK_POWER.descri: When an ally attacks, spend Mark to deal additional attack damage.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_POWER_ETERNAL_REST_FORG: At the start of your turn, create Aurora Sword.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_POWER_BATTLEMARK_BOND_P: When an ally attacks, chance to gain Mark.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_POWER_AURORA_CRIMSON_TW: Whenever you create Aurora Sword, create Crimson Sword.
While Swordlight is in the discard pile, Aurora Sword damage is doubled.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_POWER_SHATTERED_AURORA_: Whenever you discard {DiscardThreshold:inverseDiff()} Aurora Sword cards, gain {EnergyGain:diff()} Energy.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_POWER_SWORD_CURTAIN_POW: Whenever you create Aurora Sword, gain Block.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_POWER_CITADEL_AURORA_RE: At end of turn, gain Aurora Chain for swords in the discard pile.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_POWER_RETURNING_EDGE_AU: Whenever Bounce returns a card to hand, create Aurora Sword.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_POWER_FORMLESS_EMBERLIG: Replace Aurora Sword or Crimson Sword creation with random sword creation.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_POWER_UNNAMED_CARD40_PO: When you create Crimson Sword, chance to create more Crimson Sword.
